data_description.providers: Select which joke sources to use. Note: "Geek Jokes" (mostly Chuck Norris / crude) and "Yo Mama Jokes" (roast humour) serve unfiltered adult content and are not family-friendly — both are off by default.

error.invalid_refresh_interval: Refresh interval must be between 1 and 1440 minutes
error.no_providers_selected: At least one joke provider must be selected
